title: B001: Implement common types and pure function packages
summary: Review of incremental change: added input validation in RenderPastePipeline to reject empty strings in BaseFilters entries, plus corresponding table-driven tests. The validation correctly returns an error with pipeline name and index context. All tests pass (24 test functions, 100% statement coverage). go vet clean.

tests_checklist.item: Edge cases are covered (trailing, leading, single empty entry)
Error messages assert specific substrings (pipeline name, index)
Tests use project Gomega conventions (dot-import, NewGomegaWithT)
Table-driven structure used for multi-case validation

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing input validation pattern (fail-fast with descriptive fmt.Errorf)
Validation loop is concise and clear
Error message includes pipeline name and index for debuggability
CC-0004 tracking comment present on validation block
SPDX license headers present on both files

security_checklist.item: No external/user input handled directly (pure function, struct input)

architecture_checklist.item: No Kubernetes API calls — function remains pure

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty BaseFilters entries rejected before pipeline assembly
Error returned immediately with nil result

defensive_checklist.item: Empty string entries in BaseFilters validated
Error includes context (pipeline name, index) for diagnostics
